sentence: go to a news site, accept the cookie consent banner if one appears, then open the top headline

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to a news site.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
actions: Navigate to https://www.bbc.com/news

workflow.name: On News Homepage - Handle Cookies
workflow.description: Check for and accept a cookie consent banner if it appears.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If a button with text 'Yes, I'm happy' or 'Accept all' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Yes, I'm happy'

workflow.name: On News Homepage - Open Top Headline
workflow.description: Locate and click the most prominent news headline on the page.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If no cookie consent banner is visible (e.g., no button with 'Yes, I'm happy')
If a prominent headline element (e.g., an h3 or h2 within the main content area) is visible
actions: Click the link associated with the first prominent headline element

workflow.name: On Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the top headline article has been successfully opened.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news/
If a main article title (e.g., an h1) is visible
actions: Terminate: The top headline article has been opened.
